About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong momentum performers at the top of the 700+ ticker ranking. ELA ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.5, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 283.49% and flawless performance across all moving average gates (above SMA 30/50/100/200). However, ELA shows a "overextended" momentum signal (3.55) despite outperforming SPY by 252% over the year, suggesting the move may have run ahead of itself. STRO ranks close behind with comparable long-term strength (305.24% 1-year return, also passing all SMA gates), but displays more measured short-term momentum with a 1-day return of only 1.03% versus ELA's 5.8%. Both names significantly outpaced major indices over 1 year and show confirmed volatility ratios, yet ELA's overextended flag warrants caution for new entries despite its top ranking—the ratio consistency deteriorates notably in shorter timeframes (ratio_1m_1w: 1.01), indicating momentum may be consolidating or reversing in the medium term.
